sql_queries.insert: INSERT INTO table_name (column1, column2) VALUES (value1, value2);
sql_queries.update: UPDATE table_name SET column1 = value1 WHERE condition;
sql_queries.order_by: SELECT * FROM table_name ORDER BY column1 ASC;
sql_queries.group_by: SELECT column1, COUNT(*) FROM table_name GROUP BY column1;
sql_queries.join_inner: SELECT a.*, b.* FROM table_a a INNER JOIN table_b b ON a.id = b.id;
sql_queries.join_left: SELECT a.*, b.* FROM table_a a LEFT JOIN table_b b ON a.id = b.id;
sql_queries.join_right: SELECT a.*, b.* FROM table_a a RIGHT JOIN table_b b ON a.id = b.id;

json_queries.delete_field_example: Remove key from JSON object (implementation depends on language)

basic.select_with_alias: SELECT column1 AS c1 FROM table_name;
basic.where_ilike: SELECT * FROM table_name WHERE column1 ILIKE '%value%';
basic.returning: INSERT INTO table_name (col1) VALUES ('val') RETURNING id;

advanced.upsert: INSERT INTO table_name (id, col1) VALUES (1, 'value') ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET col1 = EXCLUDED.col1;
advanced.cte: WITH temp AS (SELECT * FROM table_name) SELECT * FROM temp;
advanced.recursive_cte: WITH RECURSIVE t(n) AS (VALUES (1) UNION ALL SELECT n+1 FROM t WHERE n < 5) SELECT * FROM t;
advanced.window_function: SELECT col1, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY col2 ORDER BY col3) FROM table_name;
advanced.case_statement: SELECT col1, CASE WHEN col2 > 10 THEN 'high' ELSE 'low' END FROM table_name;

indexes.create_unique_index: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_name ON table_name (column1);
indexes.partial_index: CREATE INDEX idx_name ON table_name (column1) WHERE column2 IS NOT NULL;
indexes.gin_index_jsonb: CREATE INDEX idx_jsonb ON table_name USING GIN (jsonb_column);

json_jsonb.build_object: SELECT jsonb_build_object('name', col1, 'age', col2) FROM table_name;

arrays.contains: SELECT * FROM table_name WHERE array_column @> ARRAY[1];

full_text_search.basic_search: SELECT * FROM table_name WHERE to_tsvector('english', column1) @@ to_tsquery('english', 'word');
full_text_search.ranking: SELECT column1, ts_rank(to_tsvector(column1), to_tsquery('word')) FROM table_name;

roles_permissions.grant: GRANT SELECT, INSERT ON table_name TO username;
roles_permissions.revoke: REVOKE INSERT ON table_name FROM username;
